title: Skyward Heart – Cinematic Couple Lockscreen Portrait
fullPrompt:
Create an ultra-realistic cinematic low-angle couple portrait with a smartphone lockscreen UI overlay. Capture in 8K DSLR quality with extremely sharp focus, zero blur, no artificial smoothing, no CGI or cartoon look. Maintain hyper-realistic skin texture, detailed fabric, and crisp environment clarity.

ASPECT RATIO
3:4 vertical

SCENE
Open outdoor environment with a clean, minimal sky background.
Soft light blue sky with subtle natural clouds filling the entire frame.
No buildings, no objects, no distractions.

SUBJECT
A couple leaning toward the camera from above, captured in a low-angle perspective, creating a modern selfie-style composition.
Framing must clearly show both faces and hands.

FACE & IDENTITY RULES (IMPORTANT)
Faces must remain fully natural and identity-preserved.
Do NOT beautify, reshape, or smooth skin.
Maintain real human imperfections (pores, texture, subtle asymmetry).
Works for any couple.

POSE (STRICT)
Both subjects leaning slightly forward toward the camera
Heads tilted slightly inward, close to each other
Each subject one hand extended downward toward camera
Fingers forming a clear heart shape in the centre frame (thumbs + fingers touching)
Direct eye contact with camera

EXPRESSION
Soft natural happy smiles (IMPORTANT)
Natural, warm, romantic, friendly vibe
No exaggerated expressions

OUTFIT (IMPORTANT)
Female: simple, minimal black t-shirt (soft fabric, natural drape)
Male: white inner t-shirt with black casual shirt (natural folds), optional smartwatch
Clothing must look real with visible texture and folds

LIGHTING
Natural daylight from front-top direction
Soft, even illumination on both faces
No harsh shadows
Natural highlights on skin (cheeks, forehead)
Balanced exposure with realistic tones

BACKGROUND
Full sky visible (light blue + soft clouds)
Clean minimal composition
No distractions

CAMERA & COMPOSITION (STRICT)
Low-angle shot (camera placed below, pointing upward)
Close-up framing (faces + hands clearly visible)
50mm realistic lens perspective
Heart shape perfectly centered
Ultra-sharp focus on faces, hands, and sky
NO blur anywhere

STYLE
Hyper-realistic outdoor couple photography
Modern, clean, social media aesthetic
Natural color grading (no overprocessing)

LOCKSCREEN UI OVERLAY
Top center: “Sunday, 19 April” (minimal iOS-style font)
Below: large bold time “19:04”
Top left: signal icon + “Verizon”
Top right: battery icon (47%)
Clean, subtle smartphone lockscreen overlay

blur, motion blur, depth of field, soft focus, background blur, CGI look, cartoon style, plastic skin, distorted hands, extra fingers, extra hands, wrong heart shape pose, bad anatomy, identity change, watermark, low resolution
author: Admin
